/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/heat_omp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_omp.dir/src/solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_omp.dir/src/solver_openmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_omp.dir/src/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_omp.dir/src/boundary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_omp.dir/src/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_omp.dir/src/config.cpp.o -o bin/heat_omp  /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
